title: stachys penanevada
intro: Stachys penanevada, also known as Betony, is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and distinctive leaf shape. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stachys penanevada include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and used in traditional herbal remedies.
